project_type: Next.js 14 App Router dashboard with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install, 2. Run npm run build to verify no TS/build errors
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network - full access. Node.js 22 available via nvm.
key_patterns: Next.js App Router with app/ directory, Tailwind CSS for styling, JSON files in /data/ for persistence, path alias @/* mapped to project root
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router pages and layouts, data/ - JSON seed data files, scripts/ - Python extraction scripts
